calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Confirm Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848 Continued hearing from June 17, 2014 for final approval and signing of court order for The Sale of Real Property costs and expenses.

Walter Gerard Parsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party Sonya M. McDonald. Plaintiff Sonya M. McDonald present in court.

Charles Spiegel, Esq., Court appointed Arbitrator for the Sale of Real Property, present in court. Diane B. Nguyen present in court.
Court signed in open court order to confirm sale, finalize close of escrow, approve fees of referee and others, and conditinal discharge of referee.
Court adjourned.

Ntc Of Mtn To Confirm Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jun-19-14 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Walter Gerard Parsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party Sonya M. McDonald. Plaintiff Sonya M. McDonald present in court.

Charles Spiegel, Esq., Court appointed Arbitrator for the Sale of Real Property, present in court. Diane B. Nguyen present in court.
Tangie Leverett sworn and examined by the court.
Don Diltz, Managing Broker, Stanford MBA present in court.

Plaintiff Sonya M. McDonald's Moton to Confirm Sale of Real Property is heard this day.

Court approved and confirm the sale of the property.
Court ordered matter continued to Thrusday June 19, 2014 at 11:30 AM. Counsel to provide proposed order with the terms and conditions of the sale and approval of the costs by the close of business tomorrow June 18, 2014.
Court adjourned.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Walter Parsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Sonya McDonald.
Plaintiff Sonya McDonald is present in Court.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Quzzie Vickers Jr.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff is sworn and examined on her own behalf.
The Court having considered the evidence and argument presented, and good cause appearing, It is herebey ordered, adjudged and decreed as follows:

1. Plaintiff Sonya M. McDonald (hereafter "McDonald") and defendant Quizzie Vickers, Jr. (hereafter "Vickers"), are the owners of the real property commonly known as 214 Broad Street, San Francisco, California 94112, Assessor's Parcel Number 7106-005C (hereafter "the Property.") Each of the owners own an undivided, 50% interest in the Property, in fee simple.

2. The liens and encumbrances on the Poperty appearing of record or otherwise known to the parties or apparent from an inspection of the Property, and which will materially affected by this action, are as follows: defendant City and County of San Francisco (hereater "City") has a senior lien(s) for payment of redemption taxes or other assessments in the current total amount of $1,310.30, subject to change.

Please see scanned judgment for the details.

Interlocutory judgment for partition by sale of real property is signed in open Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Walter Parsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff SONYA M. McDONALD. Plaintiff Sonya M. McDonald present in court.
No appearance on behalf or by defaulted Defendant QUZZIE VICKERS, JR.,
Defendant Quzzie Vickers, Jr., default duly entered on Sept. 30, 2013.
Debra d. Lew, Deputy City Attorney appearing for Lien Claimant City and County of San Francisco Office of the Treasures and Tac Collector.
Court ordered matter continued to Monday March 3, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in this department.
Court adjourned.
